text:
Asuka is the name of more than one character in the Evangelion franchise:
Asuka Langley Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Asuka Langley Sohryu, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.

Asuka Shikinami Langley, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
